items.title: Taking the heat. Sauna's popular and there may be health benefits too
items.description: It's an age old practice that's having a moment right now. But is there anything to the health claims? Scientists say sauna is more than hot air.

items.title: Can a digital tablet cut back a country's overuse of antibiotics?
items.description: Overprescribing antibiotics breeds antibiotic resistance. A new tool aims to lower a notably high rate of such prescriptions in Rwanda.
